title: BodyMine
body:
![bodymine title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e248cdf2f73a673c902c4ec6e5d596aeeed0aaed.png)

# Introducing
Bodymine — realistic FPS experience in Minecraft, inspired by Bodycam or COD. You can play in single player trying to beat a game in a new way, or you can play in multiplayer with your friends in DeathMatch mode. 

**Made to have fun with your friends on private server**

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/D0smdW5wVZg" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

# Features
- A lot of weapons and attachments
- Custom Deathmatch-style respawn system (but you need to setup this one) provided by [Respawn points](https://modrinth.com/mod/respawn-points) mod
- Bodycam-style shaders (with NightVision support)
- Quake-style jump-pads!
- Fair-play minimap & worldmap

# Instalation
1. You need **Fabric 0.15.11**, you can use **Prism, Multi MC, or ModRinth** launcher to download the modpack. 
   
2. Most mod configs are **set up**, so you just need to download and start playing. 
   
3. For better individual experience while playing, you can configure these mods: [Health Regeneration Overhaul](https://modrinth.com/mod/health-regeneration-overhaul), [Leawind Third Person](https://modrinth.com/mod/leawind-third-person), [Parkour Thinghies](https://modrinth.com/mod/parkour-thingies), [Respawn points](https://modrinth.com/mod/respawn-points), [Starter Kit](https://modrinth.com/mod/starter-kit), [TACZ](https://modrinth.com/mod/timeless-and-classics-zero).
